A two-[[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] '''BARC speeder''' was utilized by [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="LEGO" /> Like the regular [[BARC speeder/Legends|BARC speeder]] which was used by the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], it had a turbine [[Engine/Legends|engine]].<ref name="Visual Dictionary" />

The two-person speeder had two main differences from the BARC [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder]]: instead of seating just one driver, it was capable of seating an additional tail [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] in the space behind the pilot's seat who carried a personal [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]. The two pairs of [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannons]] of the speeder were in front of the driver on the bottom of the speeder, while the original BARC speeder's cannons were behind the driver.<ref name="LEGO" />

==Behind the scenes==
The BARC speeder comes from the [[Lucas Licensing|licenced]] [[LEGO]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' ''Clone Troopers Battle Pack'' toyset, released in [[2007]] as part of their [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']] toy line. The speeder model differs from the one that was used during the Clone Wars, with the two main differences mentioned above.<ref name="LEGO" /> The set is also included in [[2014]]'s ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Visual Dictionary: Updated and Expanded]]'', written by [[Simon Beecroft]] with additional text by [[Jason Fry]].<ref name="Visual Dictionary" /> The [[2017]] source book release ''[[Ultimate LEGO Star Wars]]'' calls set "Republic Speeder Bike" and contains basic description of the vehicle.<ref name="ultimate">[[Ultimate LEGO Star Wars|''Ultimate'' LEGO ''Star Wars'']]</ref>
